title: TranslateRequest
description: Request body for the Yandex Translate API translate endpoint

sourceLanguageCode.description: The language code of the source text. Most languages use ISO 639-1 format (e.g., 'ru'). Required when using a glossary.

targetLanguageCode.description: The target language code to translate the text into. Most languages use ISO 639-1 format (e.g., 'en').

format.description: Format of the text to be translated.

texts.description: Array of strings to translate. The maximum total length of all strings is 10000 characters.

folderId.description: ID of the folder to which you have access. Required for user account authorization.

model.description: Model ID if using a custom translation model.

speller.description: Enable spell checking for the source text.

TranslateGlossaryConfig.description: Configuration for applying a glossary during translation

GlossaryData.description: Inline glossary data with source-to-translation text pairs

glossaryPairs.description: Array of text pairs. Max 50 pairs. Total source text ≤10000 chars, total translated text ≤10000 chars.

GlossaryPair.description: A source-to-translation term pair for use in a glossary

exact.description: Enables exact matching for neuroglossary term forms.
